channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Harden has 24th 50-point game, 1 shy of Kobe Bryant for 3rd all-time, as Obama watches
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden delivered another 50-point game Wednesday night, putting on a throwback performance in the Clippers' new arena.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucks' Giannis Antetokounmpo says consistency of his work ethic helped him join 20,000-point club
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo believes his latest milestone should serve as a testament to his consistent work ethic.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shorthanded Jazz lose to last place Wizards, 125-122
item.description: WASHINGTON, D.C. (ABC4 Sports) - Kyshawn George scored 23 points, Alex Sarr added 21 and the Washington Wizards edged the Utah Jazz 125-122 on Wednesday night in a battle of two last place teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Antetokounmpo joins 20,000-point club as Bucks roll past short-handed Mavericks 137-107
item.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo scored 32 points to bring his career total over 20,000, Damian Lillard added 34 points and Kevin Porter Jr. had a triple-double as the surging Milwaukee Bucks trounced the short-handed Dallas Mavericks 137-107 The 30-year-old Antetokounmpo has scored 20,010 career points.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cavaliers hold off Heat 112-107 to extend winning streak to 12 and clinch playoff spot
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 26 points, Darius Garland had 10 assists and the Cleveland Cavaliers survived some sloppiness in the final two minutes to win their 12th straight game, 112-107 over the banged-up Miami Heat.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Condon helps No. 5 Florida top No. 7 Alabama 99-94 in key SEC matchup
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Alex Condon had 27 points and10 rebounds to lead No. 5 Florida to a 99-94 win over No. 7 Alabama on Wednesday night. The Gators (26-4, 13-4 Southeastern Conference) also got 22 points and eight assists from Walter Clayton Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sharks trade 2028 draft pick to Penguins for veteran defenseman
item.description: San Jose Sharks acquire Vincent Desharnais from Pittsburgh Penguins for a 2028 fifth-round draft pick
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Mavericks' Kidd blasts speculation that a heavy workload contributed to Irving's knee injury
item.description: Dallas Mavericks coach Jason Kidd took issue with media speculation that Kyrie Irving’s heavy workload over the last month led to the nine-time All-Star’s season-ending knee injury.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: St. Thomas is rising with rare D3-D1 jump. NCAA postseason ban makes Summit tourney the present peak
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — One of the highest-scoring teams in the country has 22 wins, the No. 2 seed for its conference tournament — and no place to play after that. For the University of St. Thomas, the accelerated transition to full-fledged NCAA Division I member is almost over.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tim Tebow teases 1st baby's gender with black-and-white photos before making big announcement
item.description: Tim Tebow and his wife have revealed the gender of their first baby due this summer — but not before giving their fans, and themselves, a little tease.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Raiders give pass rusher Maxx Crosby record-breaking extension
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — The Raiders not only extended the contract of star defensive end Maxx Crosby, they made him the highest-paid non quarterback in NFL history.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College hoops is full of versatile big men who could bust brackets in March Madness
item.description: Danny Wolf moves with the freedom of a guard in a 7-footer's body, bursting off screens for catch-and-shoot 3-pointers, beating defenders off the dribble, using his vision to find open teammates over smaller players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Phil Mickelson rips Fred Couples as 'low class' over claims Brooks Koepka wants back in PGA Tour
item.description: Phil Mickelson called out Fred Couples in a fiery post on social media on Tuesday after the PGA Tour veteran claimed Brooks Koepka wants to get back on the Tour.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR countersues 23XI and Front Row, as well as Michael Jordan's manager, in dispute over charters
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — NASCAR's revenue-sharing charter system is under threat of being disbanded, according to a Wednesday counterclaim filed by the stock car series against Michael Jordan-owned 23XI Racing and Front Row Motorsports that singles out Jordan's longtime business manager.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lightning acquire Gourde and Bjorkstrand and Panthers get Vanecek as NHL trade action heats up
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning have answered the cross-state-rival and defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers’ first couple of additions ahead of the NHL trade deadline with a big move of their own.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bengals' Sam Hubbard retires from NFL at 29
item.description: Cincinnati Bengals defensive end Sam Hubbard announced on Wednesday he will retire from the NFL after only seven seasons. He is 29 years old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Green Day's Billie Joe Armstrong, rapper Too Short join Oakland Ballers' ownership group
item.description: (KRON) -- East Bay rap icon Too Short and Green Day frontman Billie Joe Armstrong are getting behind the Oakland Ballers. The team announced on Wednesday that the two internationally renowned musicians -- both of whom have East Bay roots -- will be joining the team's ownership group.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake seeks redemption in MLS home opener against Seattle Sounders
item.description: After a humbling early exit in the CONCACAF Champions Cup at the hands of Herediano, Real Salt Lake looks to hit the reset button ahead of their 2025 MLS regular season opener against the Seattle Sounders.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4
